steps.title: Translate the problem into an equation
steps.content:
The product of $x$ and $(x - 7)$ equals 18. Set up the equation:
$$x(x - 7) = 18$$

steps.title: Backsolve using the answer choices
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (9):
$$9(9 - 7) = 9(2) = 18$$
The product equals 18, confirming our equation. That matches choice B — B is correct.
